current_model.read: Critical model is per-call max(owner local VJP) plus the observed raw combine floor. The large rank-local combine totals are mostly wait for the per-call owner-VJP tail.

scenarios.name: eliminate_raw_combine_floor_only
scenarios.note: Upper bound for improving registered combine compute while leaving owner-rank VJP skew untouched.

scenarios.name: uniform_owner_vjp_10pct_faster
scenarios.note: Faster VJP math for every owner rank; also shrinks skew wait in the simple arrival model.

scenarios.name: uniform_owner_vjp_25pct_faster
scenarios.note: Faster VJP math for every owner rank; representative of a real fused/grouped training GEMM win.

scenarios.name: speed_high_recv_ranks_25pct
scenarios.note: Only ranks above the call median recv_count get a 25% local-VJP speedup.

scenarios.name: speed_top_recv_quartile_25pct
scenarios.note: Only the per-call top receive-count quartile gets a 25% local-VJP speedup.

scenarios.name: cap_each_call_max_to_second_max
scenarios.note: Perfectly removes only the worst owner-rank tail per call.

scenarios.name: cap_each_call_to_p75_local_vjp
scenarios.note: Idealized load-balance/fusion case where no rank exceeds per-call p75 local VJP.

scenarios.name: cap_each_call_to_median_local_vjp
scenarios.note: Very aggressive idealized load-balance/fusion case where no rank exceeds per-call median local VJP.
